features: A TRUE EXPRESSION OF YOU A sensual evening scent for the modern woman, Lovely You is a soft, clean, floral musk designed just for you, the lively, curious, and ever-unexpected perfume lover

SOFT, CLEAN FLORALS Lovely You arrives with notes of Wild Freesia, Plum Blossom and Waterlily, easing to a heart of Orange Flower, Pink Peony and Jasmine Petals, and drying into a blend of Warm Musks, Vanilla Orchid, and Benzoin
EFFORTLESSLY ELEGANT Painted gold and adorned with SJP’s signature grosgrain ribbon in gold, this ultra-feminine and classic bottle is the perfect addition to your nightstand or perfume collection

BEAUTIFUL, RARE, AND ALWAYS UNEXPECTED A connoisseur of fragrance, the iconic actress and designer Sarah Jessica Parker’s expansion into the world of perfume has yielded a world of enticing and highly curated fragrances
description: Product Description Sarah Jessica Parker - actor, producer, businesswoman, and designer - has been fascinated with and enamored by scent since she was a young girl, so the step to develop a fragrance collection was an obvious one. In 2005, SJP released her first signature fragrance, LOVELY. Over a decade later, LOVELY remains a top seller globally, and has become a go-to scent for women of all ages, everywhere. In the years to follow, SJP has remained on top of the market, expanding her fragrance collection and crafting a wide range of perfumes, body mists, and self-care products. Directions Apply to pulse points such as wrists, neck, and behind ears. Avoid spraying directly into the face. Layer with complementary products for a longer-lasting scent. Safety Warning For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. Keep away from naked flame or direct heat sources. See more
